comment: Design-system contract enforced by tools/check-styleguide-manifest.mjs against apps/desktop/src/styles.css. tokens/families mirror the @theme declarations bidirectionally; erasedNamespaces must keep their `--<ns>-*: initial` markers; accentUsageBudget caps accent-utility occurrences across the desktop source; allow entries (file + reason) exempt a file from the raw px/hex source scan. This file is write-guard-protected: extending the design system is a reviewed human diff of styles.css AND this manifest together.

allow.reason: the token source of truth: raw px appears only in token values and the focus outline

virtualized grid: the row window is positioned with an inline style transform/height (offset + total scroll height are runtime pixel values that no token utility can express); all colors/spacing remain tokens
